title: Interactweaks
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Interactions/BH_INT_PromoCard.webp "title")](https://bisecthosting.com/mczph)

This mod is designed for the [Interactions modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/interactions), but you can also use it in your own modpack.
